title: Fog Looks Good Now ~ Port
description: Port of the mod 'Fog Looks Good now', made for the ADJ modpack (but free to use).
body:
This is a 1.20.1 port of the mod [Fog Looks Good Now](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fog-looks-good-now). This is merely a port, all credits go to [CAPPIN1](https://www.curseforge.com/members/cappin1/projects). I made it for my future modpack, 'A Distant Journey', but you are free to use it in yours too.

Please don't ask me for ports to other versions. I might do a 1.21.1 port if I ever decide to make a modpack for that version, but no promises :3

## Known incompatibilities

*   [Enligthend](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enlightend) - for some reason it entirely disables the fog with FLGN. I didn't test it so I don't know if it is 100% an Enligthend issue, but removing it from my modpack fixed it.

## Original description

Fog Looks Good Now creates a greater sense of depth and atmosphere in Minecraft by shifting the fog start forward, maintaining the same view distance while greatly improving the visuals of the game.

In addition to this, the mod adds configurable cave fog and biome-specific fog densities.
